expansion_plans.expansion_objective: Expand the data center campus buildout universe into a reviewable company and supplier set without leaving the bounded lane.
first_actions: Expand only inside the bounded system label and named stress layers.

expansion_plans.expansion_objective: Expand the grid equipment and transformer buildout universe into a reviewable company and supplier set without leaving the bounded lane.
entity_lane_hints: core, coil, insulation, and conductor input suppliers
first_actions: Confirm visible beneficiary manufacturers from mixed-source public evidence.
Expand upstream from transformers, switchgear, and substation equipment into component and material layers.
Pull company filings only for entities that appear inside the bounded system lane.

expansion_plans.expansion_objective: Expand the utility and large-load power buildout universe into a reviewable company and supplier set without leaving the bounded lane.
first_actions: Separate utility/operator names from supplier names inside the lane.
Confirm which utilities are reporting large-load agreements, load growth, interconnection activity, or substation buildout.
Only advance live filing work for entities with explicit lane-specific local support.
